title: The Quiet Moves are the Hardest

1. Qc6 {threatens Qe8+} Kg7 (1... Qd8 2. Qxc3 a3 3. Qc4+ Ke7 4.
Nd5+ Kf8 5. b4 {W has a N for a P}) 2. Qe8 Qd6 3. Ne6+ Kh6 4. Qf7 {
